_comment: Pools to track. Discovered via on-chain enumeration of SPL-stake-pool family programs (SPoo1Ku8..., SVSPxpvH..., SPMBzsVU...) sorted by total_lamports desc. Top 20 by TVL as of 2026-05-10. Names verified where known; rest will display as truncated addresses until named via PR.
_format: { pool_address: string, name?: string, note?: string, added_at?: ISO8601 }
_seed_method: rank-by-TVL via Helius getProgramAccounts on all 3 SPL-stake-pool family programs

additions.note: Discovered on-chain. Largest SPL-stake-pool on Solana by TVL (~11.1M SOL). Name unverified — TODO.
